image.title: H Abbaspour Kasgari, S Moradi, AM Shabani, et al.

item.title: Evaluation of the efficacy of sofosbuvir plus daclatasvir in combination with ribavirin for hospitalized COVID-19 patients with moderate disease compared with standard care: a single-centre, randomized controlled trial.
